---
title: "Welcome to MYP 5 Mathematics"
subtitle: "Your Roadmap to Final Exam Success"
number-sections: false
appendix: true
---

Welcome to your comprehensive revision hub. This isn't just a textbook; it's a **living document** designed to evolve with you as we move toward your final MYP 5 assessments.

::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
## 🚀 A Growing Resource {.unnumbered}
This booklet is updated **ongoingly**. New chapters and advanced units will appear as we cover them in class, ensuring your revision material is always synchronized with your learning.
:::

## How to use this Booklet {.unnumbered}

::: {layout="[[1,1], [1,1]]"}
### 🎯 Mastery Tracking {.unnumbered}
Every unit starts with clear **Learning Targets**. Use these as your personal checklist. If you can't tick it off, you aren't ready for the test!

### 🗂️ Formula Cards {.unnumbered}
No more hunting through notebooks. Quick-access digital cards provide the identities and rules you need at a glance.

### ⚡ Dynamic Practice {.unnumbered}
Our **"Test Your Knowledge"** sections feature a "Try Again" button that generates new numbers for the same problem type. Practice the *method*, not the memory.

### 🔍 Instant Feedback {.unnumbered}
Every exercise includes a hidden solution. Toggle it only after you've put pen to paper.
:::

## 📈 The Journey: Tiered Practice {.unnumbered}

We use a color-coded system to help you scale your skills from foundational to exam-ready:

| Level | Focus | Goal |
|:---:|:---|:---|
| 🟢 | **Easy** | Building fluency and basic recall. |
| 🟡 | **Medium** | Multi-step processing and application. |
| 🔴 | **Challenging** | Exam-style logic and complex problem solving. |

::: {.callout-tip}
## Pro Tip for Success {.unnumbered}
Don't just read the solutions. Mathematics is a "doing" subject. Use the **Interactive Testing** feature until you can solve the 🔴 Challenging problems without looking at the hints!
:::
